name: Spa-Francorchamps
author: Community
description: Built for Spa's combination of high-speed straights (Kemmel) and technical sections (La Source, Bus Stop). Moderate downforce with stiffer front for Eau Rouge commitment and stable braking into La Source.
strengths: Good top speed on Kemmel straight
weaknesses: Stiffer front can feel nervous in slow chicanes

strategies.notes: Start on Softs for early pace advantage. Pit lap 5 for fuel and switch to Mediums for the second stint. Softs degrade noticeably after 5 laps at Spa. For 20+ lap races, add a third stint on Hards.

Extra fuel for reduced efficiency in the wet. Stay on Wet compound both stints unless track dries — then pit early for Mediums. Reduce speed through Eau Rouge and Blanchimont, aquaplaning risk is high. Brake earlier into La Source and Bus Stop.

gearing.description: Balanced for Kemmel straight speed and Les Combes exit pull
